title: Callitriche intermedia
taxonomy: Callitriche intermedia is a species of aquatic plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is also known as intermediate water starwort, which is part of the genus Callitriche. The species is native to Europe and Western Asia. Callitriche intermedia is a perennial plant that grows in freshwater environments, such as ponds and lakes. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and its classification is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - angiosperms, clade - eudicots, clade - asterids, order - Lamiales, family - Plantaginaceae, genus - Callitriche, species - C. intermedia.
